Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

why some devotees answer any question with "just chant Hare Krishna"?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-10-14 · 3 answers
what do you think?

1. pure devotion caused by pure chanting makes them disgusted with any theme apart from the pastimes of the Lord in Vraja
2. they came to preach so to make our lives less complicated.
3. they are actually babajis disguised as prakrita bhaktas coming to show us the way....
4. we did not know about chanting Hare Krishna until they came and they just did us a favor.
5 they are really infiltrated mormons trying to make us to join them...

others....
user [40] · 2007-10-14
I told them not to tell you I was a Mormon!!!
user [19] · 2007-10-15
maybe it is a computer virus on this site that replies "chant hare krishna" when no one replies
user [192] · 2007-10-15
It has been my experience that if a devotee is responding to another devotees perceived dilema,he may respond with " just chant Hare Krishna ", implying that the situation is in Krishnas good hands.

If it is always the the same answer from the same person,best to get a second opinion.
